title: Verify user login to logout journey with EULA page
scenario: Verify the complete user login to logout journey, including EULA acceptance flow, and confirm the "Log In" button is displayed after logout.
steps: Start the app for the first time.
View the EULA and Privacy Policy text displayed after initial setup.
Navigate through the following menus: Color Theme, About, General Settings, Account.
Verify that the 'Log In' button is displayed after logout.
expected: After logout, the 'Log In' button is displayed on the screen.
